message.thinking:
We need produce JSON array with 3 objects. Each object: "question": "Chapters"/"Description"/"Structure". Provide feedback: highlight problems or strengths. "complies": true/false.

We need evaluate text. Text: "Bachelor’s work structure: Šis darbs ir sadalīts divās galvenajās daļās – teorētiskajā un praktiskajā. Teorētiskā daļa sniedz šī darba kontekstu. Tās saturs ir sadalīts trīs daļās. Pirmajā daļā ir izskaidrots vispārējais evakuācijas princips un evakuācijas principi slēgtās telpās, nodrošinot vispārīgu tēmas kontekstu. Otrajā daļā tiek analizēti Xiaomi arēnas plāni un izvērtētas tās evakuācijas iespējas. Trešajā daļā aplūkoti citi pētījumi, kas ir vērsti uz līdzīgām tēmām."

We need to answer:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections? It says the work divided into two main parts: theoretical and practical. The theoretical part has three sections. So main sections are listed? It lists two main parts but not the practical part's sub-sections. But main sections of thesis: theoretical and practical. That seems listed. So yes. But does it list all main sections? Might be missing the practical sub-sections. But question likely: does text list main sections? I'd say yes partially. Provide feedback: mentions two main parts, but not practical sub-sections. So compliance? Might be yes, but borderline. Probably compliance: true because main sections are listed.

2. Description: Does text briefly describe contents of each section? It describes theoretical part content: explains evacuation principle, analyzes Xiaomi arena plans, reviews other studies. That is brief description of each subsection. So yes. But does it describe practical part? No. So partial. Feedback: lacks description of practical part. Compliance: false.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure? We see two main parts, theoretical part has 3 subparts. Practical part not described. So general structure partially understood. I'd say not fully clear due to missing details. So compliance: false.

Thus produce array:

[
  {"question":"Chapters","feedback":"Text names two main parts – teorētiskajā un praktiskajā – and outlines the three sub‑sections of the theoretical part, so the primary sections are identified. It does not mention the sub‑sections of the practical part, but the main parts are clear.","complies":true},
  {"question":"Description","feedback":"The theoretical part’s three sub‑sections are described in a concise way, but the practical part receives no content description at all, leaving the reader without a picture of what it covers.","complies":false},
  {"question":"Structure","feedback":"The overall layout – two main parts, with the theoretical part broken into three sub‑parts – is partly visible, yet the missing details of the practical part make the full structure less clear than it could be.","complies":false}
]

Ensure JSON formatting.
